overall.description: A first-person perspective walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night. The camera moves steadily along an elevated walkway between towering skyscrapers, revealing neon-lit buildings and holographic advertisements. The footage is from the video game Cyberpunk 2077, featuring high-fidelity cinematic graphics with a dominant neon color palette of blues, purples, and warm yellows.

events.description: ambient light increases as the corridor opens slightly ahead, revealing more of the city lights in the distance

agents.ego_description: moving steadily along the elevated walkway between dark building walls, approaching the illuminated city center

entered.detail: dark concrete facade of the adjacent skyscraper forming the left boundary of the walkway
tall modern building with a grid of warm yellow illuminated windows
cluster of illuminated skyscrapers visible through the gap ahead
concrete and metal walkway with reflective glass railing visible at the bottom of the frame

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow, elevated walkway between two massive skyscrapers. The left side is dominated by a dark building wall, while the right features a tall glass tower with illuminated windows. The camera moves forward steadily toward a distant cluster of city lights, with the ambient lighting gradually increasing as the corridor opens ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open-air observation deck overlooking cyberpunk intersection

events.description: view opens up to reveal a massive holographic billboard displaying a humanoid figure on the right building facade
additional neon advertisements and illuminated signage become visible on the right skyscraper as the camera advances

agents.ego_description: continuing along the walkway as the cityscape opens up, revealing the bustling multi-lane street below with active traffic

notable_agents.action: streams of cars moving along the illuminated multi-lane street below, with headlights and taillights creating light trails

entered.detail: large glowing blue holographic advertisement displaying a humanoid figure, mounted on the right building facade
additional illuminated advertisements and neon signage below the main hologram
active traffic on the multi-lane road below with visible car lights and movement

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up into a panoramic view of the cyberpunk cityscape. A massive holographic billboard dominates the right building, displaying a glowing figure. Below, a busy multi-lane street teems with traffic. The camera continues moving forward along the elevated walkway, revealing additional neon signage and the full scope of the illuminated urban environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement from a confined urban corridor into a sprawling, neon-lit panoramic cityscape. It begins on a narrow elevated walkway squeezed between a dark building wall and a towering glass structure with illuminated windows. As the camera advances, the claustrophobic space gradually opens up, allowing the ambient light to increase and reveal a distant cluster of city lights. The scene then expands into a wide vista dominated by a massive holographic billboard of a glowing figure on the right, while a busy multi-lane street teems with traffic far below. Finally, the camera continues its steady glide along the walkway, uncovering a dense array of neon signage and the full, illuminated scope of the futuristic environment.
